mapper.sql: p.id, p.paper_name, p.duration, p.total_score, p.pass_score, p.start_time, p.end_time, p.status, p.create_by, u.real_name AS create_by_name, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM paper_question pq WHERE pq.paper_id = p.id) AS question_count, p.create_time, p.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT id, paper_name, duration, total_score, pass_score, start_time, end_time, status, create_by, create_time, update_time FROM exam_system.paper WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT FROM exam_system.paper p JOIN exam_system.sys_user u ON p.create_by = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM exam_system.paper p JOIN exam_system.sys_user u ON p.create_by = u.id
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_system.paper_question (paper_id, question_id, question_score, sort_order) VALUES (#{paperId}, #{questionId}, #{questionScore}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT pq.id, pq.paper_id, pq.question_id, q.question_type, q.title, q.option_a, q.option_b, q.option_c, q.option_d, q.correct_answer, q.analysis, pq.question_score, pq.sort_order, q.difficulty, q.knowledge_point FROM exam_system.paper_question pq JOIN exam_system.question q ON pq.question_id = q.id WHERE pq.paper_id = #{paperId} AND q.status = 1 ORDER BY pq.sort_order ASC, pq.id ASC
